---
title: "My Projects"
listing:
  contents:
    - path: projects/hw1-ab-testing
      title: "A/B Testing a Call to Action"
      description: "Simulating key ideas from classical frequentist statistics to test whether different newsletter sign-up prompts affect conversion rates."
      categories: [Statistics, A/B Testing]
    - path: projects/hw2-card-krueger
      title: "Replication of Card & Krueger (1994)"
      description: "Replicating the landmark minimum wage study using difference-in-differences. Finds no evidence that raising the minimum wage reduced fast-food employment."
      categories: [Economics, Diff-in-Diff]
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
page-layout: full
---
